expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly lists the focus: "Missing scenario generation for: 1) template-save 2) report-builder loading" and then provides missing Phase 4a scenarios under "A) Template Save / Save-As Overwrite" and "B) Report Builder Loading" including specific leaves tied to BCIN-7669 and BCIN-7727.

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md states "Primary phase under test: Phase 4a" and frames the content as "Phase 4a-style subcategory scenarios" ("subcategory → scenario → atomic steps → observable leaves"). It also attributes misses to Phase 4a: "Phase 4a is the phase where these misses occurred" and "Missed in Phase 4a" with Phase 4a-aligned scenario generation examples.
